p2.title: Claude review output did not return requested verdict JSON
p2.issue: The single required Claude CLI review completed successfully but returned a bash inspection suggestion instead of the requested strict JSON verdict/findings body. Tools were disabled and no permission denials occurred.
p2.recommendation: Do not rerun because the pack contract requires exactly one Claude review. Record the non-decisive review output, rely on local validators for pack boundary proof, and harden future review prompts or CLI invocation to prevent tool-request style responses.
p2.adjudication: Deferred as review-harness format issue. No P0/P1/P2 code finding was returned; CP00-054 implementation boundaries are covered by service tests, RP00 validator, closeout-pack validator, and no-write contract assertions.
